narrative:
Vandalia-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,044 registered voters, with 66.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.8 percentage points.
